We pull from the world's most trusted outlets to bring you comprehensive coverage across politics, global affairs, technology, business, sports, and culture — updated every hour. NUZU News is a news aggregation service. All article headlines link directly to original publisher sources. NUZU does not host or reproduce full article content. All quotes delayed a minimum of 15 minutes. All linked articles remain the property of their respective publishers. NUZU does not endorse any linked content.

How to set NUZU as your homepage:
Chrome: Settings → On startup → Open a specific page → Add https://theseanmitchell.github.io/NUZU/
Firefox: Settings → Home → Homepage → Custom URLs → paste the URL above
Safari: Preferences → General → Homepage → paste the URL above
Edge: Settings → Start, home, and new tabs → Open these pages → Add the URL above
